summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FORGE AI v5 features: Role-based access (editor/viewer), WebSocket live presence + typing, package.json-driven Sandpack deps, daylight Sandpack chrome. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All v5 features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SandpackPreview correctly merges package.json dependencies with DEFAULT_DEPS and doesn't mount package.json as src file
WebSocket endpoint correctly accepts both cookie session_token and ?token= query param for auth
Viewer role correctly restricts chat access with 403 response and disabled UI

test_credentials.note: Test users cleaned up after testing

seed_data_creation: Created owner, viewer, and editor test users via mongosh for role-based access testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v5 features fully tested: (1) Role-based access: POST /invite with role field, PATCH /members/{mid} to change role, invalid role returns 400, GET /projects/{id} returns member_role. (2) Viewer restrictions: POST /chat returns 403 'Viewers cannot send messages', POST /chat/stream returns 403, frontend chat input disabled with 'Viewers are read-only.' placeholder, share button hidden for non-owners. (3) WebSocket: accepts cookie session_token or ?token= query param, sends presence on connect, broadcasts typing to others (excludes sender), ping/pong works, bad auth returns error and closes. (4) Sandpack: DEFAULT_DEPS includes react-router-dom, lucide-react, clsx, date-fns, axios, framer-motion; package.json detection merges deps; sp-daylight/sp-noir classes applied based on theme.

backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/invite with role='editor' creates member with editor role
POST /api/projects/{id}/invite with role='viewer' creates member with viewer role
POST /api/projects/{id}/invite without role defaults to editor
WebSocket accepts ?token= query param for auth
WebSocket with bad token returns error and closes
WebSocket for project user has no access to returns error
WebSocket typing broadcasts to others (excludes sender)
WebSocket presence includes user info with role
frontend: Chat input placeholder 'Viewers are read-only.' for viewers
Theme toggle switches between noir and daylight
Sandpack uses sp-daylight class in daylight theme
Sandpack uses sp-noir class in noir theme
SandpackPreview shows idle state when no files

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502
